question: Give me the works written for violin, clarinet and piano (strictly)
sparql:
PREFIX ecrm: <http://erlangen-crm.org/current/>
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
SELECT ?work WHERE { ?work efrbroo:R25_performed ?performance . ?performance ecrm:P1_is_identified_by ?identifier . ?identifier dct:identifier "http://data.bnf.fr/ark:/12148/cb11938184j" }
